chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 853 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.7216/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.7217/2025 (R/Surety) 18.12.2025 Mr. Amjad Ali Maitlo, Advocate for applicant / surety..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. This application has been filed by the applicant seeking return of surety document. As per contentions of learned Counsel, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it appears that accused Ali Madad alias Madad was granted interim pre-arrest bail by this Court vide order dated 18.11.2024, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/-, for which the applicant stood surety by depositing original special savings certificate of such amount. Thereafter, interim pre-arrest bail of accused was confirmed by this Court vide order dated 13.01.2025. Subsequently, the accused has been acquitted by the learned trial Court, as is evident from the judgment dated 31.10.2025, annexed with this application. Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, learned Additional Prosecutor General, present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice and does not oppose this application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
